notes: LocalBrain 0.2.1: one-click integration with Codex, OpenCode, Claude Code, and ScreenLex (via a Responses-API/Anthropic-Messages translation bridge in front of mlx_lm.server); fixed a CORS preflight bug that broke the built-in Chat page and any browser-based client behind the bridge; backend processes now reliably terminate on app quit. (0.2.1: corrected a UI copy issue in the Integrations page.)
